sglang.title: [KDA] Fix mixed exponent bases in Triton chunk prefill
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
KDA defines each per-channel decay gate in natural-log space. Let $g_t \in \mathbb{R}^{D_k}$ be the per-token log-decay gate and let its chunk-local cumulative gate be
$$
G_t = \sum_{s=1}^{t} g_s
$$
The decay that propagates information from position $j$ to position $i$ is
$$
D_{i,j} = \e

sglang.title: [AMD] Cache AITER expert mask across decode
sglang.author: zx3xyy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The AITER MoE runner rebuilds expert_mask_gpu from the local expert mapping on every dispatch. The local expert mapping is fixed for the lifetime of the dispatcher, so recomputing the mask (which includes a host→device copy) on every decode step is wasteful.
Modifications

Guard the AITER

sglang.title: Guard min_new_tokens penalizer against None eos_token_id
sglang.author: vedularaghu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
The min_new_tokens penalizer builds its stop-token set with {req.tokenizer.eos_token_id}. When the tokenizer has no eos_token_id (None), that None flows into an int64 tensor and crashes any request that uses min_new_tokens/min_tokens. This only adds the eos id when it is not None.
Fixes #319

sglang.title: Treat partial_json_parser AssertionError as incomplete JSON
sglang.author: vedularaghu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
_partial_json_loads() can raise AssertionError from partial_json_parser's fix_fast() on some partial/ambiguous inputs instead of signaling "incomplete". During streaming tool-call parsing this propagates and fails the request. This converts the AssertionError into a JSONDecodeError so caller

actual tree_cache/pool

Purpose
#48979 added the is_padding argument to _moe_C.topk_softplus_sqrt, but the current XPU kernel does not yet support it.
This PR adds a workaround to fall back to old interface for XPU, This will be removed once xpu-kernels is updated.

Use multithreading to accelerate preprocessing. You can specify the number of threads using renderer_num_workers.

is_padding-aware call to torch.op

The bug
VLLM_XLA_CACHE_PATH (derived from XDG_CACHE_HOME) and VLLM_CONFIG_ROOT (derived from XDG_CONFIG_HOME/HOME) are hashed into the torch.compile cache key (envs.compile_factors() → backends.py hash_key and caching.py aot_compile_hash_factors). Where a cache or config directory lives carries no i

vllm.title: [Core][DSV4] Compact MXFP4 indexer KV cache and packed group overlays
vllm.author: GirasoleY
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Context
When DeepSeek V4 uses MXFP4 indexer K values, engine reserves the larger FP8 row for them. Its packed KV planner also buckets layers by page size, leaving avoidable holes when different cache groups have different mixtures of page sizes.
This PR:

sizes MXFP4 indexer K rows from their packed

Applying global_scale to the dense-MLP output allocates an 86 MiB
temporary.
Adding the sink-expert output to the route
